base_stable.text: The bridge holds while the signal crosses.
The gate opens after the bridge holds.
A stable boundary lets the signal pass.
The crossing waits until the boundary is steady.
A latch keeps the path stable before transfer.
The held path admits the next signal.
The bridge marks the crossing and then releases.
The boundary holds while the signal moves across.

base_repeat.text: The bridge holds while the signal crosses.
The gate opens after the bridge holds.
A stable boundary lets the signal pass.
The crossing waits until the boundary is steady.
A latch keeps the path stable before transfer.
The held path admits the next signal.
The bridge marks the crossing and then releases.
The boundary holds while the signal moves across.

paraphrase_same.text: The pathway stays steady while the message moves through.
A firm edge allows the signal to continue.
The span remains fixed until the crossing is complete.
A held route lets the next pulse pass.
The crossing proceeds after the path settles.
The bridge keeps the transfer stable.

symbolic_inversion.text: The bridge breaks before the signal can cross.
The boundary blocks the signal and denies passage.
The gate closes after the bridge fails.
The crossing collapses before the latch can hold.
Transfer begins before the path becomes stable.
The signal leaves while the boundary breaks.

concrete_unrelated.text: The cup falls and shatters on the kitchen floor.
The rain taps on the window beside the red chair.
A stone rolls down the hill into cold water.
The candle melts beside a blue notebook.
A truck turns slowly under the streetlight.
The orange peel curls beside the metal spoon.

social_affective.text: A child laughs beside a sleeping dog.
Two friends argue quietly at the table.
The old woman smiles at the noisy street.
The teacher comforts the nervous student.
A brother waits while his sister sings.
The neighbor waves from the open doorway.
